headline: 2 Cash-Heavy Stocks with Impressive Fundamentals and 1 We Ignore
summary: Companies with more cash than debt can be financially resilient, but that doesn’t mean they’re all strong investments. Some lack leverage because they struggle to grow or generate consistent profits, making them unattractive borrowers.

headline: EMCOR: Exceptional Business But Valuation Stretched; Waiting For A Pullback Makes Sense
summary: EMCOR (EME) Q1 2026 surge and AI data center demand look strong, but valuation is stretched.
